name: Nekopirate: Quest for Gold!
author: Poki
description: Nekopirate: Quest for Gold! is back with even more treasure-hunting fun! Play as the brave cat pirate on a thrilling platform adventure packed with gold coins, tasty cans, and dangerous creatures. Jump, fight, and collect as you chase after the one and only crown. Can you gather all the coins and claim your pirate glory? How to play Nekopirate: Quest for Gold!? Move: A/D or the left and right arrow keys Jump: W or the up arrow key Attack: left click or the space bar Who created Nekopirate: Quest for Gold!? Nekopirate: Quest for Gold! is created by AJ Ordaz. Play their other games on Poki: A Pretty Odd Bunny , Nekopirate , A Pretty Odd Bunny: Roast it! , cannon-blast, Ranch UFO , La Petite Avril , and Lidle Legend ! How can I play Nekopirate: Quest for Gold! for free? You can play Nekopirate: Quest for Gold! for free on Poki. Can I play Nekopirate: Quest for Gold! on mobile devices and desktop? Nekopirate: Quest for Gold! can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
